svg.title: Helix Stax Infrastructure
svg.desc: Five-layer architecture: Cloudflare edge, 4-node K3s cluster (heart/edge/vault/forge), platform services, applications, and external dependencies. Animated flows show traffic, OIDC, and monitoring paths.
svg.text: LAYER 2 · K3s CLUSTER — 4 NODES · WireGuard VPN
helixstax.net · K3s v1.32.3 · AlmaLinux 9.7 · Hetzner Cloud
All production workloads via Helm + Devtron CD
